description:
Parent epic: V3 E8: Observability standards

Source task 2/7 from MILESTONE_V3.md:

- Verify correlation IDs: session, conversation, request, run, trace, span.

Epic closure criteria:
- local Jidoka traces and production telemetry share correlation fields
- observability docs remain standards-friendly and dependency-light

comments.text: Verified and hardened correlation ID handling by lifting session/conversation/context refs from nested extra_refs into emitted trace metadata while preserving request/run/trace/span fields. Added regression coverage using Jidoka.Session.chat_opts/2 and structured trace lookup. Verified with mix format --check-formatted, mix compile --warnings-as-errors, mix test, mix docs --warnings-as-errors, mix doctor --raise, and git diff --check.

title: E8: Verify correlation IDs: session, conversation, request, run, trace, span
